questionHtml:
The gene that codes for a particular polypeptide includes the base sequence shown.

GAGTACCCT

What is the base sequence of the mRNA molecule which is complementary to this sequence?

A. GAGTACCCT

B. CTCATGGGA

C. GUGTUCCCT

D. CUCAUGGGA

meta.title: The gene that codes for a particular polypeptide includes the base sequence shown. GAGTACCCT What is the base sequence of the mRNA molecule which is complementary to this sequence?
